issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 15 dmg (54% of 28 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: At turn seq 325 (floor 3, encounter 1, turn 16), the enemy dealt 15 damage when the player had 28 HP. This is 54% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 15 damage (54% of player's 28 HP)

issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 22 dmg (116% of 19 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: At turn seq 329 (floor 3, encounter 1, turn 17), the enemy dealt 22 damage when the player had 19 HP. This is 116% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 22 damage (116% of player's 19 HP)

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 1 (crystal_golem) — impatient profile
issues.description: The impatient player was defeated by crystal_golem (common) on floor 3, encounter 1 after 17 turns. They dealt 40 damage but took 79. Accuracy was 72.9%.

evidence.metric: Defeated on floor 3 by crystal_golem (79 damage taken)

issues.suggestedFix: Scale early floor difficulty more gradually

issues.title: Dead turn: player played 0 cards on floor 3, encounter 1, turn 16
issues.description: On turn 16 of encounter 1 (floor 3), the player ended their turn without playing any cards. This could indicate AP exhaustion, empty hand, or a stuck state. Hand size was 5 and AP was 3.
